variants.name: 抓马女王
variants.ability: 如果你在夜晚死亡，且你在当天“疯狂”地证明自己是一个善良角色：你获得该角色的能力且能正常使用。然后你会得知该角色是谁(或得知该角色不在场)。
variants.otherNightReminder: When the Drama Queen dies tonight, show them the "YOU ARE" card and the in-play Townsfolk they were mad about being today. Mark them with the "has ability" reminder token.
